nav.search_placeholder: What service are you looking for?

landing.hero_title: Find the perfect <1>freelance</1> services for your business
landing.hero_subtitle: Millions of people use FreeTasker to turn their ideas into reality. Discover top talent safely and securely.
landing.features_title: A whole world of freelance talent at your fingertips
landing.feature1_desc: Find high-quality services at every price point. No hourly rates, just project-based pricing.
landing.feature2_desc: Find the right freelancer to begin working on your project within minutes.
landing.feature3_desc: Always know what you'll pay upfront. Your payment isn't released until you approve the work.
landing.cta_title: Find the talent needed to get your business growing.

tour.client_step1: Welcome to FreeTasker! Let us show you around your Client tools.
tour.client_step2: Click here to instantly post a new project to our freelancer network.
tour.client_step3: Your primary hub! Track all your open, active, and completed projects here.
tour.client_step4: All your freelancer interactions and active chats will appear here.
tour.freelancer_step1: Welcome to FreeTasker! Here is how to succeed as a freelancer.
tour.freelancer_step2: Your primary hub! Track your earnings and badges here.
tour.freelancer_step3: Use the Find Work tab to manually search for open projects and submit proposals.
tour.freelancer_step4: Communicate with clients safely through our real-time messaging.
